response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional experience in Staff-level technical strategy, high-throughput systems, and highly relevant AI-agent infrastructure (including MCP). However, his complete lack of Python experience—a strict must-have for this role—makes him a conditional fit, heavily dependent on his ability to rapidly upskill in the language.
strengths: Direct hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven track record designing high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated technical leadership and ownership as a Staff Engineer and open-source Founder.
concerns: Zero mention of Python experience, which is listed as a strong must-have.
Heavy historical reliance on niche languages (DLang) over standard AI/ML ecosystem tools.
Unclear operational readiness regarding formal on-call rotations and incident response.
